title: phlox drummondii var. mcallisteri
intro: Phlox drummondii var. mcallisteri, also known as the Drummond phlox or Mexican phlox, is a perennial flowering plant native to Mexico and the southern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Phlox drummondii var. mcallisteri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
